reforms.description: A government committee proposed easing access to venture capital for small and medium-sized enterprises, allowing insurance companies and pension schemes to invest more in equity, and strengthening banks' capacity for venture capital investment.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving access to venture capital is expected to stimulate the growth of small and medium-sized enterprises, enhancing innovation and job creation.
reforms.status_evidence: A government committee proposed an easing of access to venture capital for small and medium-sized enterprises.
reforms.importance_rationale: This proposal represents a significant shift in policy aimed at enhancing the financial support available to small businesses, which are crucial for economic dynamism.
reforms.source_quote: To encourage the growth of small and medium-sized enterprises, a government committee in mid-1995 proposed an easing of the access to venture capital for such companies.
